name: Cultural Tours
description: Walk through Bhutan's living traditions — fortress monasteries (dzongs), red-robed monks at morning prayer, weavers and woodcarvers passing down centuries-old craft.

name: Adventure Tours
description: Trek the high Himalaya, cycle the East-West highway, raft glacial rivers, or hike to remote mountain monasteries you'll have entirely to yourself.

name: Spiritual Tours
description: Meditation with resident monks, butter-lamp offerings at sacred sites, and quiet days in monasteries where the prayer wheels never stop turning.

name: Festival Tours
description: Time your journey with Paro Tshechu, Thimphu Tshechu, or the smaller village festivals — masked dances, courtyard crowds, and centuries of pageantry.

name: Wellness Tours
description: Hot-stone baths, traditional medicine, yoga at altitude, and slow days designed to reset body and mind in the mountain air.

name: Luxury Tours
description: Stay at the finest lodges across the kingdom — private guides, helicopter transfers, candle-lit dinners in dzong courtyards, and access reserved for very few.
